form.formComment: Last start by 1.1 m as favourite after showing early speed, (Fr2) at Penrith (2:04.40) beating Charlies Ace in NR up to 70 on April 2 at $2.40 at the bell was leading 2.9. The good draw gives her every chance to win again.

Before that 6th (Fr5) over 1609m at this track beaten 25 m by American Hammer (1:54.40) in NR up to 80 on March 19 at $9.50. Cannot enthuse on what we have seen of late.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into ninth behind Jalaneel at this track over 1609m in a NR up to 90 on March 28 at $6. Then a handy effort when beaten by 1.4 m finishing third after a quick start, behind Constantina at Penrith over 1720m in a NR up to 70 on April 2 at $4.60. Big chance in this line-up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Broke stride shortly after the start was affected.

form.formComment: Recent efforts haven't been up to his best. Last start 8th (Fr2) over 2260m at Bathurst beaten 40 m by Ripp (2:42.50) in No NR on March 28 at $41. The start before was well back in the run when 8th (Fr8) over 1730m after racing wide at Bathurst, beaten 30 m by Soho Charmer (2:02.40) in 3yo No NR CG on March 23 at $61. Capable of much better and has a strong record at this circuit and distance.

form.formComment: Last start 4th (Fr4) over 1609m after showing early speed at this track, at the bell was 2nd-1.2 beaten 8 m by Petes Crunch Time (1:53.70) in NR up to 65 on March 28 at $3.40. Can measure right up with his A-game.
